question.question_text: What will the GBP/USD exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption). GBP/USD has a typical daily volatility of approximately 0.4-0.5% (roughly 50-65 pips). Using this, I construct confidence intervals: 50% CI covers ~±0.23% (~±31 pips), 80% CI covers ~±0.42% (~±56 pips), and 90% CI covers ~±0.57% (~±76 pips). No major scheduled events are known to dramatically shift this estimate, though general macro uncertainty (USD strength dynamics, UK economic data) is reflected in the wider intervals.
